title: Hiring Store Manager at Nerolac Select

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Nerolac Select
jsonLd.description:
We at Nerolac Select are looking for an experienced Store Manager based out of Visakhapatnam. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Nerolac Select:
Nerolac Select is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nerolac Select!
